claimText: India and the United Kingdom have concluded a Free Trade Agreement (FTA) following three years of formal negotiations.
evidenceExcerpt: India and the United Kingdom (UK) have announced the conclusion of a Free Trade Agreement (FTA) following three years of formal negotiations.
examUse: Statement-based question identifying recent bilateral trade agreements concluded by India.
distractorHooks: Replacing the UK with the European Union (EU) or the United States
Claiming the negotiations took over a decade
